audit_items.proof_trace: The only two zfree calls in ae_evport.c are in aeApiCreate (L82, immediately followed by return -1 with no further use of state) and aeApiFree (L106, at the end of the function with no subsequent dereference). The caller aeDeleteEventLoop (ae.c:125-130) makes no further ae_evport calls after aeApiFree, so the stale apidata pointer is never re-dereferenced. No double-free path exists since the error path in aeApiCreate is disjoint from the teardown path in aeApiFree.
